channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Barcelona-Bound Aid Flotilla Aims to Reach Gaza
item.description: A flotilla carrying humanitarian aid has departed from the port of Barcelona, Spain, with the stated goal of breaking the Israeli blockade of Gaza. The initiative, organized under the banner of the ‘G...

item.title: Former PDP Chairman Kolo Bukar Elected ADC State Chairman in Borno
item.description: Honourable Kolo Bukar, wey don serve before as Chairman for the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) for Borno State, don win as the new chairman for the African Democratic Congress (ADC) for the same state...

item.title: Volunteer Firefighters Across Saskatchewan Participate in Practical Training to Prepare for Wildfire Season
item.description: Hundreds of volunteer firefighters from across Saskatchewan gathered in North Battleford over the weekend to participate in a large-scale hands-on training initiative organized by the Saskatchewan Vol...

item.title: Government Signals Potential Housing Tax Changes Amidst NDIS Sustainability Concerns
item.description: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese has confirmed the National Disability Insurance Scheme (NDIS) will not be subject to means-testing, despite escalating costs. The $55 billion scheme's sustainability is...

item.title: Rajnath Singh hails India's balanced diplomacy in West Asia amid US‑Iran tensions
item.description: Union defence minister Rajnath Singh has praised India’s diplomatic approach in the ongoing West Asia crisis, saying the country has maintained a balanced and composed stance while keeping relations s...

item.title: Trump affirms continued dialogue with Iran despite deadlock in Islamabad talks
item.description: US President Donald Trump stated on Sunday that Iranian negotiators had not walked away from discussions with Washington, despite the latest round of US-Iran talks in Islamabad ending without an agree...

item.title: Ben-Gvir's Al-Aqsa Visit Sparks Condemnation Amidst Trump's Blockade Threat
item.description: Tensions in the Middle East are escalating on multiple fronts. In a concerning development, former US President Donald Trump has stated that the United States will launch a naval blockade of the Hormu...

item.title: Phoenix Pioneer Primary School Celebrates 50 Years of Service
item.description: Phoenix Pioneer Primary School is marking its 50th anniversary this year, and veteran teacher Srinivasan Moonsamy Munien is sharing his recollections of the school’s humble beginnings. Munien, a long-...

item.title: US and Iran end Islamabad peace talks without deal after 21 hours of dialogue
item.description: After almost a full day of back-to-back discussions in Islamabad, the United States and Iran did not manage to come to an agreement on several key issues, as confirmed by US Vice President JD Vance. T...

item.title: Peru Holds Presidential Election Amid Political Instability
item.description: For Peru, today na big day as dem don open polling stations for the presidential and legislative elections. The country dey choose im ninth president in just ten years, and crime plus political wahala...

item.title: RCMP Investigating Deadly Vehicle Crash Near High Prairie
item.description: The High Prairie detachment of the Royal Canadian Mounted Police (RCMP) has launched an investigation following a fatal vehicle collision in northern Alberta. According to early reports, the crash occ...

item.title: VCK reconnects with its southern strongholds ahead of Tamil Nadu polls
item.description: The Viduthalai Chiruthaigal Katchi (VCK), led by Thol. Thirumavalavan, has chosen to focus its efforts on the southern districts of Tamil Nadu during the 2026 Assembly elections. Historically, the VCK...

item.title: Airstrike Hits Borno-Yobe Border Market, Dozens Killed and Injured
item.description: Na so tragedy don happen for Jilli Market wey dey Borno-Yobe border as Nigerian military jets carry out airstrike wey suppose target Boko Haram insurgents. E shock people well well as the strike miss ...

item.title: Ouyen Man Found Dead After Disappearance, Police Investigate
item.description: A distressing incident has unfolded near Ouyen, in Victoria, after Richard Wills, 65, was found shot dead and buried on his farm. Police are currently investigating the circumstances surrounding his d...

item.title: Bishop Ben Kiengei and Wife Enjoy Mud Adventure at Northlands City
item.description: During the Easter weekend, Northlands City in Ruiru, Kiambu County, hosted the sixth edition of the Mud for Fun 4x4 Challenge, attracting numerous Kenyans, including Bishop Ben Kiengei and his wife, R...

item.title: Postal Ballot Process Initiated for Elderly and Differently-Abled Voters in Thoothukudi
item.description: In Thoothukudi, Tamil Nadu, the postal voting process for senior citizens above 85 years and differently-abled voters began on Sunday. This initiative enables voters who face mobility challenges to pa...

item.title: AMC's 'The Audacity' Critiques Silicon Valley's Billionaire Culture
item.description: AMC's new series, The Audacity, delivers a sharp and darkly comedic exploration of Silicon Valley's billionaire class. Centered on tech CEO Duncan Park, played by Billy Magnussen, the show depicts the...

item.title: Kano State Empowers 6,680 Women with N50,000 Grants
item.description: The Kano State Government don share money – N50,000 each – to 6,680 women across the state, as part of their effort to help them boost their businesses and become self-reliant. Governor Abba Kabir Yus...

item.title: Three dead, including children, after Quezon City LPG store fire
item.description: MANILA, Philippines — A tragic incident occurred in Quezon City where three people, including two children, lost their lives after a man deliberately set fire to a liquefied petroleum gas (LPG) store....

item.title: How Iranians are using social media to mock Trump during wartime tensions
item.description: This article explains how many Iranians turned to social media to mock and taunt then–US President Donald Trump during a period of sharp military and political tension between Iran and the United Stat...
